finance.exchangeRateNote: Note: Exchange rates are for demonstration purposes only and may not reflect current market rates.
finance.helocDescription: Home Equity Line of Credit (variable rate, interest-only payments during draw period)
finance.noTaxDeduction: No tax deduction now, but all withdrawals are tax-free in retirement

finance.gracePeriodDescription: Period after graduation before payments begin
finance.interestNotCapitalized: Will need to be paid separately

math.percentChange: Percent change from X to Y
